name: ResQ-Disaster-Management-App
description: The ResQ Disaster Management App is a project aimed at providing an intuitive interface for disaster response coordination. It focuses on reporting calamities, receiving alerts, managing resources, and enabling collaboration among response teams.

name: Flappy-Bird
description: The repository contains the code for a Flappy Bird game. It includes the game logic, graphics, and user interaction. The game is implemented using Python and Pygame, and it provides a fun and interactive experience for players. The code is well-documented and easy to understand, making it a great resource for learning game development with Python.
